creator: nivo@is-root.com
text:
Hi Peter,

Peter Thoenen wrote on 3-6-2007 21:22:
> Nils: Next time try doing a PR search before creating duplicate PR's
> .. see http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112492 .. your heart
> is in the right place though but I usually am a pretty active maintainer.
Patch 112492 was for version 0.1.2.13 and it said you were dropping
maintainer, so I submitted the upgrade to 0.1.2.14, didnt mean to step
on anyone's toes here ;)
> BF, Nils, or anybody else feel free to pick it up.  Please hold on
> approving 11493 as I still regulary use -devel and want to test BF's
> patch first (the new one with the new tor branch).  I will most likely
> approve it though w/o modification .. will let you know Monday COB.
>
> ALCON: As I said in 112492 I will continue to patch occasionally
> ad-hoc if nobody does and ports@ keeps it.
Since tor releases quite often, I think leaving it up to ports@ may
cause the port to be left behind. I use security/tor and wouldn't mind
maintaining it.

Greets,

Nils
